overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai riding a horse through a lush Japanese landscape. The journey transitions from a sunlit flower meadow through a rocky stream, across a wooden bridge, and into a misty forested trail with traditional shrine elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit flower meadow with forest perimeter

agents.ego_description: trotting through tall grass and white wildflowers on horseback, approaching the forest edge

entered.detail: expansive field of tall green grass dotted with white wildflowers covering the ground
thick green forest lining the left side of the meadow with sun rays filtering through
large moss-covered rock formation emerging from the tree line

segments.scene_description: The samurai rides through a wide-open meadow filled with white wildflowers and tall green grass. Sunlight filters through the dense forest lining the left side as the horse trots steadily forward toward a rocky area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bed with flowing water

events.description: horse enters rocky stream bed from the flower meadow, ground becomes wet and rocky

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating the horse through shallow water and stones in the stream bed

entered.detail: shallow stream with visible rocks and flowing water replacing the grassy meadow
clear shallow water flowing between stones in the stream bed

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a rocky stream bed with shallow flowing water. The horse carefully steps over wet stones as the surroundings become more enclosed by forest canopy on both sides, transitioning from the open meadow into a ravine.

events.description: approaching and crossing weathered wooden bridge over the rocky stream
location text 'The Riverlands' appears in the lower right corner of the screen

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and transitioning onto a dirt forest path

notable_agents.action: small bird or animal perched on the bridge railing ahead of the horse

entered.detail: weathered wooden footbridge with railings spanning the stream
dirt trail continuing beyond the bridge into misty forest

segments.scene_description: The horse crosses a weathered wooden bridge spanning the stream, with a small animal visible ahead on the railing. After crossing, the path becomes a dirt trail winding through misty forest as 'The Riverlands' location text appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with traditional shrine structures

events.description: passing a small red shrine gate and wooden fence on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: galloping along the winding forest trail past wooden shrines and rock formations

entered.detail: small traditional red wooden shrine gate with a thatched roof beside the path
simple wooden post fence running alongside the left edge of the trail
massive boulders and rock outcrops lining the sides of the forest path

segments.scene_description: The journey continues along a winding dirt path through dense forest with dappled sunlight and mist. The rider passes traditional Japanese elements including a small red shrine gate and wooden fences, navigating between large rock formations as the trail curves through the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit, open meadow into a misty, enclosed forest trail. It begins with a samurai riding through a wide expanse of white wildflowers and tall green grass, moving steadily toward a rocky terrain. As the open landscape narrows, the horse transitions into a rocky stream bed, stepping over wet stones within a deepening ravine enclosed by a dense forest canopy. The scene then shifts as the rider crosses a weathered wooden bridge, leading onto a winding dirt path where the air grows misty and the location text for The Riverlands appears. Finally, the journey curves through the woodland, passing a small red shrine gate and wooden fences nestled between large rock formations under dappled sunlight.
